title: Amethyst Relics
body:
# Cursed Heart

Optional cursed item for players seeking higher difficulty.

Unlocks a 6-level progression system with powerful combat abilities.

Early levels apply sunlight weakness and movement penalties.

Higher levels grant execution-style combat, chaining teleports and resets.

Lv 6 removes movement penalties and enables full combo potential.


# Respite

Damage is applied to the food bar first, not health.

Health is only damaged once the food bar is empty.

Lethal damage causes knockback instead of instant death.


# Rewind

After a 5s delay (configurable), returns the player to a previous position.

Grants 40% max health for 4s (configurable).

Timing and duration can be adjusted for balance.


# Enderman Effect

After dealing damage, grants a dodge with position shift.

Attackers are marked while the effect is active.

Marked players trigger a teleport when they approach.
